items.title: Watch: Donald Trump storms out of NBC interview
items.summary: Donald Trump walked out of an interview with NBC’s Meet the Press after he repeatedly made claims that the US 2020 presidential elections was rigged. The US president’s abrupt exit came during a tense exchange between himself and NBC’s Kristen Welker during the interview in Wisconsin.
